note: Iron benchmark runs 2 background spawns (5M-iteration background_work each) concurrently with the parallel-for transform; C benchmark times only the parallel transform phase (no background work). Language-design-inherent: Iron spawn semantics include background thread overhead in total elapsed time. C time is ~11ms (sub-50ms timing noise). Stable observed Iron/C ratio ~5.5x; threshold set to 8.0x (+20% margin on 5.5x + additional headroom for thread scheduling variance).
